purpose: Component reference for the in-app Git Manager: GitManagerView, RepoTabs, GitWelcome, InitFlow, ChangesPanel, DiffViewer, CommitPanel, RemotePanel, BranchPanel (1567 lines), HistoryPanel (1097 lines, SVG branch graph), QuickActions (962 lines), and SafetyDialogs (Confirm/DoubleConfirm).
gotchas: HistoryPanel computes a lane-based SVG graph — large logs need infinite scroll batches of 50
QuickActions auto-generates commit messages from staged file list
Discard-all flow requires typing 'DISCARD' to confirm
patterns: Parallel data fetches via Promise.all on repo switch
